# Taninwat Kaewpankan

Product & Project Coordinator based in Copenhagen, Denmark — a product
generalist who codes.
Personal site: https://taninwatkaewpankan.xyz

## About

Taninwat Kaewpankan (goes by Ice) is a product generalist based in Copenhagen —
project coordination, product thinking, and frontend engineering. Originally
from Thailand, he moved to Sweden at 16, studied at Uppsala University (BA Game
Design & Project Management, MSc Entrepreneurship), and now lives in Copenhagen,
Denmark.

He figures out what to build, then makes sure it ships — coordinating teams and
delivery, shaping product direction, and building the thing himself when the
work calls for it (React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js). He led a 25-consultant
student consultancy as Head of Organization, and contributes part-time to the
early-stage AI startup Trailr AI under equity warrants, where he owned the
product side of a full platform UI/UX redesign.

He's honest about where he stands: his degree is a vocational frontend program,
not a CS degree. What he brings is genuine end-to-end delivery experience —
coordinating simultaneous projects and shipping real products.

## Skills

Coordination & Product: Project Coordination, Product Management, Agile / Scrum,
  Stakeholder Management, Process Design, Workshop Facilitation, Product Thinking
Frontend: React 19, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, REST APIs
Tooling: Vitest, Playwright, GitHub Actions, Figma
Approach: Design systems, accessibility, performance

## Projects

- Millennial Consulting (https://www.millennialconsulting.dk) — Student-run
  strategy consultancy delivering pro-bono projects in 8-week cycles. Coordinated
  ~5 parallel client projects per cycle across 25–28 volunteer consultants; grew
  from operations team member to Head of Operations to Head of Organization.
  Introduced a hybrid Agile/waterfall process that was adopted org-wide.
- Trailr AI (https://trailr.ai) — Early-stage AI video platform that secured
  enterprise trials with Nordisk Film and DR. Owned the product side of a full
  UI/UX redesign: benchmarked competitors, set a design direction, and scoped
  ruthlessly to what the existing backend could support — cutting features rather
  than forcing rewrites. Led a navigation overhaul in React and Zustand.
- MockMate (https://mockmate.space) — AI mock interview platform: paste a job
  description, answer tailored questions from an AI interviewer, get a structured
  graded report. Owned the product end to end. Next.js, Google Gemini, Prisma,
  AWS Lambda.
- Bevisly (https://bevisly.com) — Skill verification platform. Owned end-to-end:
  defined the two-role model, designed row-level-security policies, shipped 8+ AI
  features. React, TypeScript, Supabase, PostgreSQL with row-level security.
- Satoshi Standard (https://www.satoshi-standard.xyz) — Bitcoin purchasing power
  dashboard. React, Tailwind, real-time price API, full Vitest test suite.
- Cinema Booking System (https://cinema-booking-system-project.vercel.app) —
  Full-stack booking engine with concurrent seat-locking at the data layer.
  React, Node.js, PostgreSQL.
- Racha Beauty & Wellness (https://rachabeautywellness.com) — Commercial site
  built from scratch. 95+ Lighthouse score, measurable local SEO improvement.

## Experience

- Frontend Developer → Product Engineer (part-time), Trailr AI (Sep 2025 – Present)
  Joined as a frontend intern; after graduating, continued part-time with equity
  warrants.
- Head of Organization (Volunteer), Millennial Consulting (2023 – 2025)
- Business Development Intern, Spreadly (Jan 2023 – Mar 2023)

## Education

- Higher Vocational Diploma in Frontend Development (2-year program) — Jensen Yrkeshögskola (2024 – 2026)
- MSc Business & Management (Entrepreneurship) — Uppsala University (2022 – 2023)
- BA Game Design & Project Management — Uppsala University (2019 – 2022)
